participants.name: Vinny Anthony II
participants.notes: Re-tested after NFL Combine. Improved 40 from 4.54 to 4.53, vertical from 34.5 to 37, and 3-cone from 6.86 to 6.68. Did not do broad jump at combine; 9'7" broad at pro day. Shuttle matched combine time of 4.07.

participants.name: Mason Reiger
participants.notes: Did not test at pro day. Was on hand to support teammates and meet with NFL teams. Stood on combine numbers (4.78 forty, 1.61 10-yard split, 40" vertical, 10'5" broad). Transfer from Louisville.

participants.name: Dekel Crowdus
participants.notes: Biggest winner of the day per SI. 40 time reported as 4.36 by SI (from team spokesperson) and 4.37 by BadgerNotes. Had only 1 catch in 2025 season. Transfer from Kentucky via Hawaii.

participants.name: Austin Brown
participants.notes: Team-high 43-inch vertical, would have been top among safeties at combine. 20 bench reps would have ranked 1st among safeties at combine. Unofficial RAS of 8.94 per MathBomb. Played in Shrine Bowl.

participants.name: Nyzier Fourqurean
participants.notes: 4.10 shuttle and 6.84 three-cone would have ranked 1st among CBs at combine. Former DII All-American at Grand Valley State. Missed 2025 season due to eligibility dispute.

participants.name: Ricardo Hallman
participants.notes: Undersized CB, listed around 5'10" 185 lbs in scouting reports. Battled injuries early in 2025 season.

participants.name: Riley Mahlman
participants.notes: Listed at 6'8". Did not receive combine invite. 40+ career starts. Switched from RT to LT in 2025 season. Did not run 40-yard dash.

participants.name: Ben Barten
participants.notes: Led all Wisconsin players with 33 bench press reps, which would have tied for 2nd among all positions at 2026 NFL Combine. Only other reported drill result was bench.

participants.name: Darryl Peterson III
participants.notes: Listed at 6'1" 248 lbs. Timed 4.75 in 40 per Tony Pauline/EssentiallySports. Looked good in pass-rush and off-ball LB drills. Drawing interest from Miami Dolphins. RAS of 5.12. Tweener EDGE/LB prospect.

participants.name: Lance Mason
participants.notes: Move TE prospect. Ran 4.63 forty and 4.37 shuttle per Tony Pauline/EssentiallySports. Rest of marks described as pedestrian. Getting attention from San Francisco 49ers since Shrine Bowl. Transfer from Missouri State. Led Wisconsin in receiving yards (398) and TDs (4) in 2025.

additional_notes: Pro day held Friday, March 6, 2026 at the McClain Center (indoor) in Madison, WI. Approximately 20 players participated per SI and JetNation. Scouts from all 32 NFL teams were in attendance. Results described as 'unofficial' from a Wisconsin team spokesperson. The SI article referenced full unofficial results from the team but the complete table with all ~20 participants was embedded as an image/graphic and could not be fully extracted. Sources confirm the following players were expected to participate but individual drill numbers beyond those listed above were not found in available reporting: Jay'viar Suggs (DT), Parker Petersen (DT), Brandon Lane (DT), Preston Zachman (S), and several others. Crowdus 40-yard dash has a minor discrepancy: SI reports 4.36, BadgerNotes reports 4.37. Vinny Anthony's Combine 40 was officially 4.54 (not 4.45 as one source erroneously reported); he improved to 4.53 at pro day. Timing method not explicitly stated as electronic or hand-timed in any source reviewed.
